title: Majestic Menaces
body:
![The main banner art for the mod](https://imgur.com/QGLFUoX.png)
Adds a unique new boss mob to the game. More are coming soon.

**TEIKOKU SENSHI** is the first boss to be added by this mod. His dash attacks are quick and deadly. He spawns in the Ancient Relic, which can be found in the Flower Forests, Birch Forests and Cherry Groves. Destroy the spawner block (recognised by it's blue rings) to spawn the boss. Defeating him grants you an Ancient Eye, which can be used to craft Eyes of Ender, providing an alternative way to travel to the end dimension.

![The structure where the boss is located](https://imgur.com/cFFRaAz.png)
(The structure where the boss is located)
![The spawner block that spawns the boss](https://imgur.com/R9T1WkP.png)
(The spawner block that spawns the boss)
